items.title: Shared Claude, Codex, and Alloro Chat command files stay identical
items.precondition: The three shared instruction files have been patched.
steps: Count the -tw and Worktree Bootstrap sections.
items.expected: All three files are byte-identical and each new section occurs exactly once.
items.evidence: cmp passed twice; final SHA-256 for all three files is 400fc73ce4da9d955583764b8e3e89a35d7a3c969e2a671f7e87ec22703085dd; section-count assertions passed.

items.title: Planning and test commands enforce linked-worktree boundaries
items.precondition: Run assertions from the primary Alloro checkout.
steps: Assert -s creates a new secondary linked worktree from current HEAD by default.
Assert the portable root is derived from the primary worktree.
Compare absolute git-dir and git-common-dir for the current checkout.
Assert -tw requires those paths to differ.
items.expected: The policy creates a fresh planning worktree and refuses -tw in this primary checkout.
items.evidence: Text assertions passed; current Alloro git-dir equals git-common-dir, so the documented -tw hard gate classifies it as primary and refuses it.

items.title: Alloro safety policy covers ports, auth, data, mail, queues, and missing adapter
steps: Assert the Alloro worktree root and seeded local auth are documented.
Assert dev/production DB writes are disabled by default.
Assert email uses a local capture sink.
Assert the shared network policy uses OS-assigned port 0.
Check whether package.json currently declares test:worktree.
items.expected: Every safety invariant is present and the missing runtime adapter is reported honestly.
items.evidence: All text assertions passed. package.json has no test:worktree script, matching the documented safe-refusal behavior.

items.title: Changes remain within instruction and plan scope
items.precondition: The Alloro and Alloro Chat trees already contain unrelated user work.
steps: Inspect scoped diffs for Alloro CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.
Inspect the Alloro Chat AGENTS.md diff.
items.expected: Only requested instruction files and this plan are changed by this work; unrelated application changes remain untouched.
items.evidence: Scoped diffs contain only the requested workflow sections; scoped git diff --check passes in both repos. Existing PM source changes and alloro-chat/package-lock.json remain outside this patch.
